steps.t: Carn Dûm lies far to the west of Tármunn Súrsa. Éa begged you to find her missing husband, the hillman-warrior called Erscin.
Erscin is at Carn Dûm, far to the west of Gath Forthnír. Erscin is waiting to speak with you again.
Éa is at Tármunn Súrsa, east of Carn Dûm. You found Erscin, alive and well, within Carn Dûm and returned him to safety. You should let Éa know the goo…
